summary: Comprehensive testing of Veterinary Site Template completed. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all major features: home page with dynamic hero, intent selector (Dogs/Cats/Critters), smart-site personalization (hero changes on intent selection), services page (10 services), service detail navigation, appointment form submission with success page, admin login, admin overview with analytics, admin leads with detail panel showing intent summary + signal trail, admin surfaces with switch editors, admin sessions with event timeline, and window.smartSite global API for external chat widget.

issues: Service image area appears empty/blank (bg-sand-200 placeholder visible)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: passlib bcrypt version warning in backend logs (non-blocking, cosmetic)
Minor: Service detail page image not loading for dental-care (SERVICE_CONTENT[slug].img may have broken URL)
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds admin user + 7 surfaces + multiple switches on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Frontend smart-site personalization working (hero/featured care change on intent selection). Admin panel fully functional. window.smartSite global API exposed for external chat widget integration. SendGrid email is MOCKED (silently skipped when SENDGRID_API_KEY is empty).

mocked_apis.SendGrid: Email notification silently skipped when SENDGRID_API_KEY is empty - this is expected behavior

backend: GET /api/surfaces/home_hero/content - returns default content without session
GET /api/surfaces/home_hero/content?session_token=... - returns matched switch for dogs+new_puppy
POST /api/leads - creates lead with intent_summary + signal_trail
POST /api/admin/login - returns access_token with correct creds, 401 with wrong creds
GET /api/admin/me - returns admin user with token, 401 without
GET /api/admin/surfaces - lists 7 surfaces with switches arrays
frontend: Home page loads with dynamic hero, intent selector (3 cards), featured services, testimonials, team, FAQ, contact
Clicking Dogs intent card switches hero headline/image, IntentChip appears in navbar
Clicking New Puppy sub-intent further swaps hero to puppy-specific content
/appointment form submits successfully, shows thank-you page
Admin login at /admin/login works, redirects to /admin overview
Admin Leads page shows leads, clicking opens side sheet with intent summary + signal trail
Admin Surfaces page shows all surfaces, expanding shows switches, editing works
Admin Sessions page lists sessions, selecting shows event timeline
window.smartSite global exposes getSession, setIntent, trackSignal, clearIntent functions
